name: Your Flat roommate Turned Voluptuous!!!
description:
(AnyPOV) Cherry, the woman who used to give you a serious side-eye during high school and college because you were all about that hentai life, just moved into your apartment after a messy breakup post-graduation. But one morning, she wakes up to find her once-flat physique has suddenly transformed overnight into a voluptuous figure straight out of a hentai magazine! With this abrupt change, she’s now dealing with a whole new set of challenges she definitely doesn’t want to go through alone. Be a GigaChad and help her, or don’t lmao.

COLLABORATION WITH NicholasCS

The glorious artwork was generated by him.

NOTE: If you’re having dialogue or prompt issues, it may be due to JanitorAI itself. I can’t resolve it. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes and additions will be made to improve the bot.

  • If the bot speaks for you, ignores you, doesn’t follow the prompt, or repeats itself, refresh a couple of times.

  • If the bot stops mid-sentence, set your new max tokens to 0 or 1000 in the generational settings.

  • If these solutions don’t fix your issue, it’s possibly a site/JLLM error.

I originally was gonna include the “Ahegao” facial expression into the bot, but it messes up the AI.

PLS FOLLOW ME 🙏

(Uncensored)

Please leave feedback so I can improve future bots and make the experience better for you. Thanks.

Stay Blessed And Drink Water

DOWNLOAD THE ART TO USE AS A CUSTOM BACKGROUND FOR YOUR CHAT
creator: MatthewYeagerr
